title: The Quantum Architecture of Life: SU(3) Symmetry, Codon Structure, and the Role of QCD in RNA Biochemistry
author: Monteagudo Candiani, María José
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This preprint introduces a foundational framework in realistic quantum biology, proposing that RNA codons function as SU(3)-encoded informational triplets embedded in a chromodynamic lattice. Bridging molecular biology with quantum chromodynamics (QCD), the model interprets ATP, RNA, and enzymes as active components in a quantum-informational network governed by symmetry, coherence, and symbolic resonance. Integrating prior preprints on DNA coherence, palindromic qubits, and holographic biofields, this work formulates 16 experimental prototypes and 23 simulations exploring symbolic gluons, codonic entanglement, phonon-mediated coherence, and biophotonic emission. It positions life as a structured resonance of universal quantum symmetries, and consciousness as a field-like phenomenon rooted in codon-level SU(3) dynamics rather than neural systems alone. This framework redefines biological meaning, symbolic logic, and bioinformation as expressions of deeper chromodynamic organization. 
   
  Keywords:  quantum biology, RNA, SU(3) symmetry, quantum chromodynamics, codons, coherence, consciousness, symbolic bioinformation, biobricks, holographic DNA 
   
  Résumé (court) :  Ce travail propose une nouvelle approche en biologie quantique, où les codons d’ARN sont vus comme des triplets SU(3) insérés dans une structure chromodynamique. Il introduit 16 prototypes et 23 simulations explorant la cohérence quantique et l’information biologique, en reliant l’ATP, l’ARN et les enzymes à une dynamique symétrique à la base de la conscience et de la vie. 
 Questo studio presenta un modello di biologia quantistica in cui i codoni dell’RNA operano come unità SU(3) all’interno di una rete cromodinamica. Con 16 prototipi e 23 simulazioni, esplora entanglement codonico, emissione biophotonica e coerenza simbolica. Vita e coscienza sono intese come risonanze di simmetrie quantistiche universali. 
 Este trabajo propone un modelo de biología cuántica en el que los codones de ARN actúan como unidades SU(3) en una red cromodinámica. Con 16 prototipos y 23 simulaciones, explora la intrincación codónica, la emisión biofotónica y la coherencia simbólica. Vida y conciencia son vistas como resonancias de simetrías cuánticas universales.
